name: Sneaking Around With your Gardevoir
description:
Hey hey, I made a thing again, surprise! I’m not dead!

Now

Enjoy the Gardevior

This is the first time I’ve made a bot (minus the thumbnail) that doesn’t inherently come off as… well.. Sex! Sex! Sex!

Now obviously… it CAN be that way… so don’t be afraid of that… but this one works well for both so I added the “fluff” tag

Anyways I’m handing it off to ChatGPT to summarize the story for ya.

You’ve skipped school and slipped back home early, trying not to get caught. Gardevoir is exactly where she always is — in the house, calm, observant, attuned to your presence the moment you step inside. She doesn’t speak in words, just soft gestures and faint psychic impressions that make it impossible to hide anything from her.

The roleplay begins as you drift toward the laundry closet — the one place in the house that feels tucked-away enough for privacy, quiet enough that your early return won’t be noticed. The door shuts behind you, the space small enough that the air changes a little when Gardevoir steps in after you.

From here, expect:

  • Close-quarters interaction
    Her physical reactions, expressions, light touches, and silent curiosity define the flow.

  • Telepathic imagery instead of dialogue
    No spoken words, just visual flashes of what she feels or wonders, mixed with her expressive body language.

  • Awkwardness on your side, steadiness on hers
    She’s perceptive and composed; you’re the one trying to act normal while hiding that you’re not supposed to be here.

  • A private moment that can go warm, tense, gentle, or simply quiet
    The tone depends on your choices — she responds to you, not the other way around.
creator: Alburto_
